message:
build: pin nightly toolchain to 2026-02-05 for reproducible builds

Pin from bare "nightly" to "nightly-2026-02-05" so that all agents and
CI get identical compiler behavior regardless of when they run.  Bare
"nightly" silently picks up breaking changes in std::simd, allocator
APIs, and diagnostics, which causes intermittent build failures across
the multi-agent swarm.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
